creator: woju@freebsd.ntu.edu.tw
text:
8bit compatible telnet client for Chinese input

Fix: 

fetch -o- \
ftp://bsd.sinica.edu.tw/pub/FreeBSD/taiwan/users/woju/ports/telnet.tgz | \
   tar xvfz - -C /usr/ports/chinese
cd /usr/ports/chinese/telnet
make package

Please commit it and close PR bin/6144, thanks.
How-To-Repeat: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=6144
